parsed.summary: This page lists HVAC fault codes (E58-E76) with their descriptions, judgment conditions, fault handling, and recovery procedures. It includes a note about severe protection faults (E22, E23, E24, E39, E52, E53, E54, E69) that require manual reset if they occur 3 times within 30 minutes. The page is dated 2016-5-17 and has a footer with a website URL.

visual_relationships.to: B system water heat exchanger outlet temperature sensor

parsed.uncertainty_notes: The visual relationships are inferred from the text descriptions; the page is purely textual with no diagrams. The note lists severe faults, but only E69 is visible on this page; others (E22, E23, E24, E39, E52, E53, E54) are referenced but not detailed here.
